rows.description: Recepta varia
rows.notes: Consensus between both extractors. Clear header with no associated monetary values.

rows.description: Novr. 10. 1774. Dr Shortridge's Benefx half a year to Mids:
rows.notes: Amounts were consistent between extractors. Chose 'gemini-flash' for the more complete and accurate description, including the date and 'Benefx'.

rows.description: Novr. 22. Mr Bloomfields Plate Money
rows.notes: Amounts were consistent between extractors. Chose 'gemini-flash' for the more complete and accurate description, including the date.

rows.description: Janr. 30. 1775. Exchequer Annuity to Xmas
rows.notes: Amounts were consistent between extractors. Chose 'gemini-flash' for the more complete and accurate description, including the date.

rows.description: Midsr. & Xmas Div: in Stock, 3 p.Cent: consol:
rows.notes: Amounts were consistent between extractors. Chose 'gemini-flash' for the slightly more accurate description (e.g., 'Midsr.' vs 'Mids.').

rows.description: Mart: 20 Increment. of Mr Richards, Bursar
rows.notes: Amounts were consistent between extractors. Chose 'gemini-flash' for the more complete and accurate description, including the date.

rows.description: Apr: 3 Took out of the Chest for L. Wittenham Div:
rows.notes: Amounts were consistent between extractors. Chose 'gemini-flash' for the more complete and accurate description, including the date.

rows.description: Jun: 5. Two Sconces for Sac: Disp:
rows.notes: Amounts were consistent between extractors. Chose 'gemini-flash' for the more complete and accurate description (including date and 'Sac:'). 'gpt-5-mini' noted uncertainty and misread 'Sac:' as 'Bac:'.

rows.description: Dr Shortridge's Benefs half a year to Xmas-
rows.notes: Amounts were consistent between extractors. Chose 'gemini-flash' for the slightly more accurate description ('Benefs' and trailing hyphen).

rows.description: June
rows.notes: This 'June' entry was correctly identified as a header/date marker by 'gpt-5-mini', but missed entirely by 'gemini-flash'.

rows.description: Mr. Oswald Jackson's Acct for the Merton estate for the year from Mic: 1773 to Mic: 1774
rows.notes: Chose 'gpt-5-mini' as its description accurately transcribed 'Merton' and 'Mic:', whereas 'gemini-flash' misread them and incorrectly prefixed the description with 'June'.

rows.description: Money Rent
rows.notes: Extractors disagreed on pounds amount (265 vs 205). Visual verification confirmed the value '265' in the image. Chose 'gemini-flash' for the amount, and its description was also correct.

rows.description: Corn Rent
rows.notes: Amounts were consistent between extractors. Chose 'gemini-flash' for the correct description 'Corn Rent'. 'gpt-5-mini' noted uncertainty and transcribed 'Gork Rent'.
Amounts and row type were consistent. Chose 'gemini-flash' for correctly leaving the description blank, as this is a purely numeric sub-total line, not containing descriptive text.

rows.description: Allowed Land Tax
rows.notes: Consensus between both extractors. Clear text and amounts.

rows.description: Rent for 3 Closes
rows.notes: Extractors disagreed on the pence fraction. 'gemini-flash' correctly identified the '½' mark as 0.5, with a good note explaining the visual interpretation. 'gpt-5-mini' missed the fraction due to uncertainty. Confirmed visually.

rows.description: Deduct
rows.notes: Extractors disagreed on the pence fraction. 'gemini-flash' correctly identified the '½' mark as 0.5, and its note included an arithmetic check. 'gpt-5-mini' missed the fraction. Confirmed visually.

rows.description: July 22? Recd Balance
rows.notes: Amounts and fraction were consistent. Chose 'gemini-flash' for the more complete description, including 'July 22?'.

rows.description: July 26. Increment from Mr Newbery, Bursar
rows.notes: Amounts and fraction were consistent. Chose 'gemini-flash' for the more complete description, including the date.

rows.description: Aug. 17. Took out of the College Chest
rows.notes: Amounts were consistent between extractors. Chose 'gemini-flash' for the more complete description, including the date.

rows.description: Jul. 22. House Fees from Mr Sarrande, Dean
rows.notes: Amounts were consistent between extractors. Chose 'gemini-flash' for the more complete and accurate description (including date and 'Sarrande' vs 'Savande').

Extractors disagreed on pence fraction and description. Visually confirmed the fraction is '¾' (0.75), aligning with 'gpt-5-mini'. Chose 'gemini-flash' for the empty description, as this is a purely numeric grand total. Note: 'gemini-flash' identified an arithmetic discrepancy (calculated 807 pounds, extracted 827 pounds). The extracted value 827 is taken as it appears on the page.

rows.description: Recepta pro hoc anno & pro debitis anni præcedentis
rows.notes: Amounts were consistent. Chose 'gpt-5-mini' for the more accurate description ('&' and 'præcedentis') and row type 'total', which is appropriate for a concluding summary with an associated amount linked by a curly brace.
